name: CatalogProduct
description: Retail catalog product information for a menu item.

id.description: The unique identifier of the retail product in the retail product catalog. This is different from the menu item identifier.

name.description: The name of the product, for example, "T-Shirt".

type.description:
The type of product. Possible values include:

* `SINGLE`: The product has exactly one variant and does not have any options.
* `OPTION`: The product is an option-type product and will contain at least one variant and at least one option.
* `UNSPECIFIED`: Product type is not specified or unknown.

images.description: List of image URLs for the product. A product can have different images than its variants.

availableOptions.description: List of available options for the product.

CatalogProductOption.description: An option for a retail product.

id.description: The unique identifier for the product option.

name.description: The name of the product option, for example, "size".

sortOrder.description: The sort order of the product option.

values.description: List of values for the product option.

CatalogProductOption.name: CatalogProductOption

CatalogProductOptionValue.description: A value within a catalog product option.

id.description: The unique identifier for the product option value.

name.description: The name of the product option value, for example, "small".

sortOrder.description: The sort order of the product option value.

CatalogProductOptionValue.name: CatalogProductOptionValue
